solutions.title: Solution (Neon)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
=
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val s
=
readLine
()!!
val l
=
s
.
count
({
it
==
'<'
})
val g
=
s
.
count
({
it
==
'>'
})
if
(
l
>
0
&&
g
>
0
)
println
(
"?"
)
else
if
(
l
>
0
)
println
(
"<"
);
else
if
(
g
>
0
)
println
(
">"
);
else
println
(
"="
);
}
